dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9201 IH: Chief Nimham Purple Heart Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ryan (for himself and Mr. Morelle) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To authorize the award of the Purple Heart to Daniel Nimham for injuries incurred during the Revolutionary War.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Chief Nimham Purple Heart Act.

section.header: Authorization for award of the Purple Heart to Daniel Nimham
section.text: Notwithstanding the criteria in section 1 of Executive Order 11016, the President may posthumously award the Purple Heart to Daniel Nimham for injuries incurred during the Revolutionary War while a Commissioned Captain in the Continental Army.
